name: colibri
description: Run GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) on a 25GB-RAM consumer machine — pure C, zero deps, experts streamed from disk. Tiny engine, immense model. 🐦

name: tools-factory
description: From any API surface to verified AI agent tools: Go CLI + MCP + skills + SQLite + policy + proofs.

name: mnem
description: Memory as state, not search — deterministic, dependency-free memory for AI agents. The memory lives in a Markdown file.

name: gonk
description: Ultra-lightweight, edge-native API Gateway for Go

name: nalo
description: Open-source Durable Objects for live applications.

name: loomabase
description: Offline-first synchronization engine for  SQLite and PostgreSQL, built in Rust with column-level  CRDTs, authoritative partial replicas, and secure multi- tenancy.

name: nanoeuler
description: GPT-2-style LLM built from scratch in C/CUDA with hand-written backprop, BPE tokenizer, FlashAttention, pretraining, and SFT.

name: coocon
description: Sandboxed code execution daemon with enforced memory, CPU, and output limits. JSON API for humans and AI agents.

name: agentmw
description: Open-source middleware for AI agents — catches mid-run failures,compresses stale context, and grows a reasoning library across runs. Any model, any framework.

name: cli-use
description: Turn any MCP server into a CLI in one command.

name: judicex
description: Open-source Legal AI workspace for evidence-grounded legal   drafting, matter analysis and verifiable answers.

name: praxos
description: MCP-powered memory, policy, and experience layer for safer AI agents.

name: distillery
description: Turn documents into high-quality instruction datasets with grounding, quality filtering, deduplication, and provenance.

name: tuneforge
description: An MCP server for dataset generation, fine-tuning, RL, and evaluation of LLMs — directly from your coding agent.

name: dbcli
description: Lightweight, agent-optimized database CLI with one-shot schema introspection, column profiling, and ERD generation.

name: Wiredigg
description: Wiredigg is a comprehensive network analysis tool with advanced security features designed for network administrators, security professionals, and IT enthusiasts. It provides real-time packet capture, protocol analysis, anomaly detection, and threat identification capabilities in a modern, user-friendly interface.

name: Mqttcpp
description: A lightweight and fast C++ library for building MQTT clients and brokers, with support for QoS, authentication, security, persistence, and user/session management.

name: duffydiff
description: DuffyDiff is a modern, user-friendly text comparison tool built with Python and Tkinter. It allows users to easily compare two text files, navigate between differences, and merge content between files.

name: Biptoken
description: Fast BPE tokenizer with guaranteed perfect text reconstruction. 2x faster than tiktoken at encoding/decoding while preserving all whitespace and formatting.

name: Win11CompatibilityChecker
description: A lightweight desktop application that checks your system's compatibility with Windows 11. Provides detailed analysis of hardware requirements including CPU, RAM, storage, TPM, Secure Boot, and more. Features a user-friendly dark mode interface with comprehensive recommendations to fix compatibility issues.

name: char-detection
description: 🔥Char detection base on crnn 字符（单字）检测基于CRNN

name: onnx2tf
description: Self-Created Tools to convert ONNX files (NCHW) to TensorFlow/TFLite/Keras format (NHWC). The purpose of this tool is to solve the massive Transpose extrapolation problem in onnx-tensorflow (onnx-tf). I don't need a Star, but give me a pull request.

name: onnx2pytorch
description: Transform ONNX model to PyTorch representation

name: DBNet.pytorch
description: A pytorch re-implementation of Real-time Scene Text Detection with Differentiable Binarization

name: keras_frcnn
description: Keras Implementation of faster-rcnn

name: nanodet
description: NanoDet-Plus⚡Super fast and lightweight anchor-free object detection model. 🔥Only 980 KB(int8) / 1.8MB (fp16) and run 97FPS on cellphone🔥

name: YOLOv5-Lite
description: 🍅🍅🍅YOLOv5-Lite: lighter, faster and easier to deploy. Evolved from yolov5 and the size of model is only 930+kb (int8) and 1.7M (fp16). It can reach 10+ FPS on the Raspberry Pi 4B when the input size is 320×320~

name: aster.pytorch
description: ASTER in Pytorch

name: torchinfo
description: View model summaries in PyTorch!
